name: start
description: The front door. System-level device setup that is orthogonal to any single capability: global/device bootstrapping such as the terminal, shared Claude settings, and the Codex CLI. Capability-specific setup (e.g. cloning a knowledge base) stays in that capability's own plugin.

interface.shortDescription: Device bootstrapping: terminal, Claude Code, and Codex CLI setup.
interface.longDescription: start gets a new machine ready. warp-setup configures the Warp terminal, claude-code-setup applies a portable global Claude Code settings baseline, and codex-cli-setup enables the Codex CLI hooks feature. System-level setup that every other plugin builds on; capability-specific setup stays in each capability's own plugin.
